product_overview: BPM Academy is a digital platform that delivers accredited food-handling courses and AI-driven sanitation plans for Colombian businesses, with automated certification, QR verification, and Wompi-based payments. The product combines video-based learning, timed exams, and AI-generated legal-compliant sanitation documents with admin tools for operations and reporting.
core_goals: Provide an end-to-end online training experience for food-handling certification (course content, video learning, exams, and PDF certificates).
Enable AI-powered sanitation plan generation that complies with Colombian regulation and can be exported as verifiable PDFs with QR codes.
Support secure, auditable verification of certificates and plans via public QR scanning and permanent verification pages.
Offer a seamless e-commerce flow with quantity, discounts and Wompi payments for individuals and businesses.
Give administrators visibility and control over users, payments, courses, and generated sanitation plans.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users using email/password or Google OAuth and redirect them to the dashboard or original page.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Iniciar sesión" button to submit -> Get redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Click Google OAuth button to sign in with Google -> Complete Google consent -> Get redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Iniciar sesión" button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Student Account Activation
features.description: Allow new students to activate their account using an emailed token and set their password.
user_flows: Visit activation link from email -> Navigate to /activate with token parameter -> Fill new password field -> Confirm password field -> Click "Activar cuenta" button -> Get redirected to /login

Visit activation link from email -> Navigate to /activate with token parameter -> Fill new password field with mismatched confirm -> Click "Activar cuenta" button -> See validation error about password mismatch
Navigate to /activate with expired or invalid token -> Fill fields and click "Activar cuenta" -> See error message about invalid or expired token

features.name: Course Landing Page (Food Handling)
features.description: Public landing page showing course features, certification info and tiered pricing with CTA to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /manipulacion-alimentos -> View course features and certification details -> View 3 pricing tiers (1-3, 4-9, 10+ people) -> Click CTA button to go to checkout -> Navigate to /checkout/manipulacion-alimentos

Navigate to /manipulacion-alimentos -> Click CTA button to go to checkout -> Navigate to /checkout/manipulacion-alimentos -> See product unavailable or out-of-stock message if product is not available

features.name: Sanitation Plan Landing Page
features.description: Public information page describing the AI sanitation plan service, compliance details, supported types and CTAs to generate or purchase a plan.
user_flows: Navigate to /plan-de-saneamiento -> Read service description and legal compliance info -> View supported establishment types and 6 sanitation module descriptions -> Click CTA to generate plan -> If logged in navigate to /sanitation/generate
Navigate to /plan-de-saneamiento -> Click CTA to generate plan -> If not logged in see login/register modal or be prompted to sign in before proceeding

features.name: Checkout & Payment
features.description: Multi-step checkout flow with quantity controls, discount code validation, optional registration for buyers and Wompi payment widget integration with polling verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout/manipulacion-alimentos -> View product summary with pricing -> Adjust quantity using + / - controls -> Enter and apply discount code -> See total price update in real-time -> If not logged in fill registration form or use login modal -> Click "Pagar con Wompi" to open payment widget -> Complete payment in Wompi widget -> Wait for payment confirmation (up to 3 min polling)
Navigate to /checkout/manipulacion-alimentos -> Enter discount code -> Click apply -> See validation error when discount code is invalid
Navigate to /checkout/manipulacion-alimentos -> Click "Pagar con Wompi" -> Complete payment in Wompi widget but payment is declined -> See payment failure state and retry option

features.name: Payment Success
features.description: Show confirmation details and transaction reference after successful payment and provide navigation to buyer dashboard.
user_flows: Complete Wompi payment -> Redirect to /checkout/success -> View transaction reference number -> Click button to go to /dashboard
Redirect to /checkout/success with missing transaction reference -> See notice to contact support or verification pending message

features.name: Buyer Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated buyer area to manage students, view sanitation plans, monitor quota and see pending orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard (authenticated) -> View student list with name, email, status, progress, certificate status -> Search/filter students by name or email -> Click to register a new student -> Fill student registration form (name, email, document type, document number) -> Submit form -> See newly registered student in list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click to register a new student -> Fill registration form with an email already registered -> Submit form -> See error message about duplicate email

features.name: Course Video Learning
features.description: Student-facing video player with a playlist sidebar to consume course modules and read descriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses/manipulacion-alimentos/learn (authenticated) -> View video player with current module -> Browse video playlist in sidebar -> Click video in sidebar to switch -> See video player update to selected module and read video description below player
Navigate to /courses/manipulacion-alimentos/learn -> Click video in sidebar -> Video fails to play due to network error -> See playback error message and retry control

features.name: Course Exam
features.description: Timed multiple-choice exam interface with start, navigation between questions, submission, scoring and certificate download on pass.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses/manipulacion-alimentos/exam (authenticated) -> View exam instructions -> Click "Iniciar examen" to begin -> Select answer for each multiple-choice question -> Click "Siguiente" to go to next question until last -> Click "Enviar examen" on last question -> View results screen showing pass/fail, score percentage and correct/total -> If passed click "Descargar certificado" and receive certificate

Navigate to /courses/manipulacion-alimentos/exam -> Click "Iniciar examen" -> During the exam time limit expires -> System auto-submits responses -> View results screen with score and pass/fail outcome
Navigate to /courses/manipulacion-alimentos/exam -> Click "Enviar examen" -> Network error on submit -> See submission error and retry option

features.name: Certificate Download
features.description: Allow students who passed to request and download a verifiable PDF certificate from the course content area.
user_flows: Navigate to /course-content (authenticated) -> View course completion status -> Click "Descargar certificado" button -> Trigger GET /api/certificates/[id] -> PDF downloads to local device
Navigate to /course-content -> Click "Descargar certificado" when no certificate is available -> See message indicating certificate not available and guidance to take/complete exam

features.name: AI Sanitation Plan Generation
features.description: Conversational AI-driven form that collects business data, generates a 6-module sanitation plan using Claude Sonnet and Voyage embeddings, and exports a signed PDF with QR verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /sanitation/generate (authenticated) -> Fill out conversational form with business details (name, type, NIT, address, legal representative) -> Submit form to trigger AI generation -> Wait for plan to be generated -> View generated sanitation plan with 6 compliance modules -> Export plan as PDF with QR code and optional professional signature
Navigate to /sanitation/generate -> Submit form with missing required fields -> See validation errors prompting for required inputs
Navigate to /sanitation/generate -> Submit valid form -> AI generation API returns error or timeout -> See generation failure message and retry option

features.name: QR Code Certificate Verification (Scanner)
features.description: Public tool to verify certificate or plan authenticity using camera-based QR scanning or image upload and show result plus scan history.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify -> Click "Cámara" tab to activate real-time QR scanning -> Allow camera permission -> Point camera at QR code on certificate -> See verification result (valid/invalid, details) -> See scan recorded in local scan history
Navigate to /verify -> Click "Subir imagen" tab -> Upload image with QR -> POST /api/verify/check -> See verification result with details
Navigate to /verify -> Click "Cámara" tab -> Deny camera permission -> See error message explaining camera access is required and fallback to image upload

features.name: Public Certificate/Plan Verification Page
features.description: Permanent public verification page that displays full certificate or sanitation plan details and a validity badge by unique code.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify/[code] -> GET /api/verify/[code] -> View certificate details (student name, course, issue date, expiry, code hash) and valid badge
Navigate to /verify/[code] for sanitation plan -> GET /api/verify/[code] -> View plan details (business name, establishment type, legal rep, NIT, generation date) and valid badge
Navigate to /verify/[code] with unknown or revoked code -> GET /api/verify/[code] -> See invalid verification status and guidance

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview to monitor KPIs, recent notifications and a 7-day sales chart.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin (authenticated as admin) -> View stats cards (total users, total sales, certificates issued, plans generated) -> View 7-day sales chart -> View recent notifications (payments, exam results, plan generations)
Navigate to /admin as non-admin -> See access denied or redirected to /login with insufficient permissions message

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Admin interface to list, search and manage user accounts including changing role and disabling accounts.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users (authenticated as admin) -> View user table with name, email, role, status, registration date -> Filter or search users -> Click user actions to edit -> Change role or disable user -> Save changes -> See updated user row
Navigate to /admin/users -> Attempt to save user changes -> Backend returns error -> See error toast and unchanged table row

features.name: Admin Payment Transactions
features.description: Admin view for all payment transactions with status filtering and Wompi reference lookup.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/payments (authenticated as admin) -> View payments table (reference, buyer, product, amount, status) -> Filter by status (APPROVED/PENDING/DECLINED) -> Click a row to view Wompi transaction ID and details
Navigate to /admin/payments -> Filter for a transaction and no results found -> See empty state with guidance

features.name: Admin Sanitation Plans
features.description: Admin grid to review all generated AI sanitation plans with links to the public verification page.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/sanitation (authenticated as admin) -> View plan cards with business name, establishment type, owner, date -> Click verification link on a card -> Navigate to /verify/[code] to view public plan details
Navigate to /admin/sanitation -> Click a plan card whose content failed generation -> See error or missing content indicator and option to retry generation

tech_stack.other: NextAuth.js 4.24.13, Supabase 2.99.0, Zod 4.3.6, jspdf, @react-pdf/renderer, qrcode, jsqr, Wompi, Stripe SDK, Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6, Voyage AI

routes.description: Landing page with product cards, CTA buttons, and branding for BPM Salud
Email/password login and Google OAuth sign-in page
Student account activation page using token to set password
Food handling course landing page with 3 pricing tiers and CTA to checkout
AI sanitation plan service landing page with legal compliance info and pricing
QR code scanner for certificate/plan verification via camera or image upload
Public certificate or sanitation plan verification details page by unique code
Buyer/Admin dashboard showing registered students, sanitation plans, quota, and pending orders
Student course material view with toggle between PDF content and exam, and certificate download
Video player with playlist sidebar for enrolled students
Exam interface for students with multiple-choice questions, score, and certificate download
Conversational form for AI-powered food sanitation plan generation with PDF export
Checkout page with quantity, discount codes, and Wompi payment widget
Payment confirmation page with transaction reference number
Admin dashboard with stats cards (users, sales, certificates, plans), 7-day sales chart, notifications
Admin course catalog management with enrollment counts and pass rates
Admin user management table with role, status, and registration date
Admin payment transactions table with buyer, product, amount, status, and Wompi ID
Admin sanitation plans grid with business name, owner, date, and verification link

known_limitations.issue: Stripe SDK is present but Wompi is the primary and only actively used payment provider
known_limitations.impact: Stripe payment flow is not functional in production

known_limitations.issue: Course progress percentage is hardcoded at 85% in the video learning page
known_limitations.impact: Progress tracking does not reflect real user progress

known_limitations.issue: Prisma schema documents the data model but is not used at runtime; all DB access is via Supabase JS client
known_limitations.impact: Schema migrations must be managed manually through Supabase dashboard

known_limitations.issue: /api/debug/test-ai-plan endpoint is present and should be restricted or removed in production
known_limitations.impact: Potential unauthorized AI plan generation in production
